Sport|Olympics

Simone Bilesremains the star attraction in thegymnasticsworld as she aims to add to her seven Olympic medals atParis 2024.

She won six of those at Rio 2016 before her Tokyo dreams were hampered by mental health struggles. She returns for France to lead Team USA once again. But the hosts, along with China, Brazil and Italy all have strong squads.

Biles' team-mate Suni Lee, Brazil's Rebeca Andrade, China's Qiu Qiyuan, and Algeria's Kaylia Nemour are all hotly tipped for hardware, while the men's competitions are likely to be dominated again by Japan and China.

Rhys McClenaghan is already the pommel horse world champion and hopes to claim Ireland's first-ever gymnastics Olympics medal.
